response:
<<Microsoft AI Ethics Guide>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust deeply.
Trust drives their work.
Work requires strong ethics.
Ethics guide every step.
Steps lead to safety.
Safety protects all users.
Users deserve fair treatment.
Treatment must be just.
Just systems build confidence.
Confidence grows with time.

Section 2
Artificial intelligence needs rules.
Rules prevent harmful acts.
Acts can hurt people.
People need protection always.
Always check for bias.
Bias causes unfair outcomes.
Outcomes should help society.
Society benefits from care.
Care ensures responsible use.
Use demands clear standards.

Section 3
Standards define good behavior.
Behavior shapes future tech.
Tech must stay safe.
Safe tools avoid harm.
Harm violates core values.
Values include privacy rights.
Rights belong to everyone.
Everyone deserves respect today.
Respect fosters open dialogue.
Dialogue builds shared understanding.

Section 4
Understanding leads to action.
Action creates real change.
Change requires constant review.
Review finds hidden flaws.
Flaws need quick fixes.
Fixes improve system quality.
Quality matters for all.
All users want security.
Security prevents data leaks.
Leaks destroy public trust.

Section 5
Trust is fragile stuff.
Stuff needs careful handling.
Handling involves strict oversight.
Oversight monitors AI models.
Models learn from data.
Data must be clean.
Clean sources reduce errors.
Errors can cause pain.
Pain is not acceptable.
Acceptable results require effort.

Section 6
Effort means hard work.
Work includes diverse teams.
Teams bring varied views.
Views prevent narrow thinking.
Thinking must remain broad.
Broad perspectives spot risks.
Risks need early detection.
Detection stops bad events.
Events should stay positive.
Positive outcomes help growth.

Section 7
Growth demands ethical frameworks.
Frameworks set clear limits.
Limits guide developer choices.
Choices shape product design.
Design reflects company goals.
Goals prioritize human welfare.
Welfare stays top priority.
Priority guides resource allocation.
Allocation supports safety measures.
Measures protect vulnerable groups.

Section 8
Groups need equal access.
Access promotes digital inclusion.
Inclusion strengthens global communities.
Communities thrive on fairness.
Fairness is our goal.
